name: Shen Cheng
page_title: Shen Cheng 沈成 – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Shen Cheng was one of the bandit leaders living between the Huai and Ru rivers along with Qu Gong and Jiang Gong. Around AD 200, Li Tong began launching campaigns to clear them out and they were eventually destroyed. Li Tong delivered their heads to Cao Cao which earned him the title Marquis of a Chief Commune and was appointed Grand Administrator of Runan for his deeds.

sections.short-biography: Bandit who was defeated and killed by Li Tong.

	 Name Notes 
	Shen 沈 can also be translated as Chen, but this translation is not used in surnames. That said, you will still find him under the name Chen Cheng.
sections.historical: Shen Cheng was one of the bandit leaders living between the Huai and Ru rivers along with Qu Gong and Jiang Gong. Around AD 200, Li Tong began launching campaigns to clear them out and they were eventually destroyed. Li Tong delivered their heads to Cao Cao which earned him the title Marquis of a Chief Commune and was appointed Grand Administrator of Runan for his deeds.

full_text:
Shen Cheng 沈成
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shen Cheng (沈成)was born in Runan. Bandit who was defeated and killed by Li Tong. Shen Cheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Shen Cheng was one of the bandit leaders living between the Huai and Ru rivers along with Qu Gong and Jiang Gong. Around AD 200, Li Tong began launching campaigns to clear them out and they were eventually destroyed. Li Tong delivered their heads to Cao Cao which earned him the title Marquis of a Chief Commune and was appointed Grand Administrator of Runan for his deeds.
